title: Generating a Complex ASCII Art
scenario: Create a vibrant ASCII art representation of a cat sitting on a tree branch, surrounded by autumn leaves. The prompt should include a detailed description of the tree shape, leaf distribution, and cat pose, while using a limited color palette.
constraints: Must be rendered in a 32x32 character grid
Limited color palette of only 5 unique characters

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated text adheres to all constraints.
Evaluates the creativity and aesthetic appeal of the ASCII art.
Verifies the effective use of the limited color palette.
Checks the balance and harmony of the composition and layout.
